title: heliopsis laevis
intro: Heliopsis laevis, also known as Smooth Oxeye, is a perennial wildflower native to North America, characterized by its daisy-like flowers and smooth stem. The plant's medicinal properties include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can be utilized to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Heliopsis laevis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations. Heliopsis laevis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, making it a versatile herb for herbal remedies.
